title: Training Overview
subtitle: Data as of {date} · {count} activities since {firstDate}
weeklyVolumeCaption: Training volume over the last 30 weeks; each week runs Monday through Sunday. Stacked bars show distance by activity type (km, left axis); the two lines show total time (hours) and calories on the right axis.
fitnessCaption: Training-load trend over the last 3 months. CTL (Fitness) is the 42-day average load, reflecting long-term conditioning; ATL (Fatigue) is the 7-day average load, reflecting short-term fatigue; TSB (Form) = CTL − ATL, plotted on the right axis. Green stripes (TSB −20 → −5): {zoneOptimal}; blue stripes (TSB −5 → 10): {zoneRecovery}.
calendarCaption: Each cell is one day within the last 12 months; darker cells indicate a greater total distance for that day.
